subjects.description: astronaut riding a white horse in the desert
subjects.appearance_details: human figure sealed in a sleek spacesuit with reflective patches and a mirrored helmet catching gold desert hues
subjects.location: center frame on horseback crossing open sand
subjects.relative_size: human scale rider, smaller than the horse but visually dominant through bright suit contrast
subjects.orientation: facing forward along the horse path, helmet turned slightly into the wind
subjects.pose: seated firmly in the saddle, leaning forward for balance
subjects.action: holds the reins tightly while riding across the desert

subjects.relative_size: large animal scale, larger than rider body mass
subjects.orientation: oriented left to right across the frame

context: An astronaut crosses a desert landscape on horseback as if exploring an alien frontier at sunset.

actions.description: The white horse enters in a strong gallop with the astronaut seated firmly in the saddle.
Dust trails behind the hooves as the astronaut grips the reins and the visor reflects golden mountains.
The pair continue across the open desert beneath long sunset shadows.

temporal_caption: An astronaut in a white spacesuit rides a pure white horse across a golden desert at sunset.
